Our Expertise

Primary Commodity

Raw Cotton

High-grade fibers sourced from the world's most fertile regions, categorized by micronaire, length, and strength.

Request Details

Cotton Yarn

Superior weaving and knitting yarns.

Fabrics

Industrial and garment grade textiles.

Agro & Food

Grains, pulses, and oilseeds.

recycling

Cotton Waste

Sustainable byproduct solutions for industrial cleaning, papermaking, and non-woven manufacturing.
